title: OpenAI pulls plug on Sora, the viral AI video app that sparked deepfake concerns
description: OpenAI is shutting down its social media app Sora, which went viral last fall as a place to share short-form videos generated by artificial intelligence but also raised alarms in Hollywood and elsewhere. OpenAI said in a brief social media message Tuesday that it was “saying goodbye to the Sora…

title: Wall Street Taps Australia’s Pension Trillions as AI Spend Soars
description: Australia’s top pension funds agree that artificial intelligence is a major US investment opportunity for the A$4.5 trillion ($3.1 trillion) industry. What’s less certain: how they’ll pick the future winners as bubble fears mount.
content:

title: E-Power Inc. Announces Strategic Expansion into Vietnam to Build a Resilient "Ex-China" Anode Material Supply Chain for Global AI Data Centers and ESS Markets
description: DOVER, USA, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- E-Power Inc. ('E-Power”, the 'Company”, 'we” or 'our”) (NASDAQ: EPOW), a global leader in energy storage battery anode materials and integrated microgrid solutions, today announced a significant milestone in its global expansion strategy following a successful high-level site inspection of the ATSC SOLARTECH facility in Hung Yen Province, Vietnam. This initiative aligns with the Company’s 'Closed-Loop' industrial ecosystem, focusing on localized production to serve the rapidly growing Artificial Intelligence Data Center (AIDC) and energy storage markets in North America and Southeast Asia.

title: Robot joins Melania Trump at White House event to tout AI teachers
description: WASHINGTON, March 25 - A humanoid robot walked down a red-carpeted White House hallway on Wednesday, accompanying U.S. first lady Melania Trump into an event where she urged greater use of artificial intelligence in education. Read more at straitstimes.com.

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Future Education: AI Takes Center Stage at the White House
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

title: Meta Lays Off 700 Employees, While Rewarding Top Executives
description: The jobs cuts and a new stock program for executives come as Meta continues to shift its focus to artificial intelligence.
content:
Meta on Wednesday laid off around 700 employees, a person with knowledge of the company said, the latest downsizing as the Silicon Valley giant shifts its priorities toward artificial intelligence.

title: OpenAI Foundation pledges $1 bil in grants to ensure AI 'benefits all of humanity'
description: OpenAI Foundation, the nonprofit that controls the artificial intelligence company OpenAI and its flagship product ChatGPT, pledged Tuesday to grant out $1 billion over the next year and to build up its capacity as a philanthropic funder. The pledge represents a major development in OpenAI's philanthropic activities and offers insight…
